subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Lord of all existence and the King of the worlds, Who hath caused the rivers of life to flow forth through the outpourings of His Command-giving Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک امکان و ملیک اکوانرا که از رشحات قلم امریه جاری فرمود انهر حیوه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @living waters; water of life
